# Security Steering — 2026-06-05

## Decisions
- Approved quarterly access review cadence for production AWS roles
- Agreed to defer vendor SOC report until Q3

## Risks
- Risk: stale IAM roles in legacy account
- Concern: incomplete control mapping for new SaaS tool

## Action items
- Action: Draft ticket for IAM role cleanup in legacy account
- Follow-up: Run csf-crosswalk on new SaaS vendor questionnaire
- Todo: Update access control policy redline with MFA requirement

## Notes
Attendees: se
